message.content:
To update your `README.md` to mention the **promptfoo** harness, I need to see the current content of the file to ensure the addition fits naturally with your existing documentation style.

Could you please provide the current content of your `README.md`?

Alternatively, if you just want a standard addition, here is a snippet you can add to your "Getting Started" or "Usage" section:

```markdown
## Evaluation Harness

We use [promptfoo](https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo) as our evaluation harness to automate testing and benchmarking of our prompts and models.

To run the evaluations:

```bash
npx promptfoo eval
```

For more details on configuration, see the [promptfoo documentation](https://www.promptfoo.dev/docs/configuration/).
```

**Please paste your current `README.md` content if you want me to generate the full updated file for you.**

message.content:
To update your `README.md` to mention the **promptfoo** harness, I need to see the current content of the file to ensure the addition fits naturally with your existing documentation style.

Could you please provide the current content of your `README.md`?

Alternatively, if you just want a standard addition, here is a snippet you can add to your "Getting Started" or "Usage" section:

```markdown
## Evaluation Harness

We use [promptfoo](https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo) as our evaluation harness to automate testing and benchmarking of our prompts and models.

To run the evaluations:

```bash
npx promptfoo eval
```

For more details on configuration, see the [promptfoo documentation](https://www.promptfoo.dev/docs/configuration/).
```

**Please paste your current `README.md` content if you want me to generate the full updated file for you.**
